content: Active agentic retrieval can be reframed as a motion planning problem for a LLM 'navigation agent' that explores the latent knowledge landscape of an external corpus, just as a legged robot navigates physical terrain with LoCoMo motion planning. We can adapt LoCoMo latency optimization principles to prune fruitless knowledge exploration branches early and prioritize high-value retrieval paths, cutting end-to-end agentic RAG latency for complex open-domain queries.
source_topics: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
trigger_topic: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
